name: Apple Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs.
2. Add cottage cheese, 1/2 cup sugar, salt, cream, and vanilla to the beaten eggs.
3. Line an 8-inch pie plate with pastry.
4. Combine apples with 1/2 cup sugar and spices.
5. Place the apples into the pastry-lined pie plate.
6. Cover the apples with the cottage cheese mixture.
7. Bake for 10 minutes at 400°F (200°C) and then continue baking for 25 minutes at 350°F (175°C) until the cottage cheese mixture is set.
8. Remove from oven and let cool.
9. Top with whipped cream or ice cream.
PASTRY:
1. Cream together butter and cream cheese.
2. Sift flour once, measure, and add salt to the cheese mixture.
3. Press the mixture firmly into a dough ball.
4. Wrap in waxed paper.
5. Chill the pastry for 12-15 minutes on a lightly floured surface before rolling it out to fit the pie plate or pan at 1/8 inch thick.
